description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The main body is constructed from a dark, likely metallic material, with a robust stock at the rear that appears to be fixed and solid. The handguard and receiver are streamlined, with a visible trigger and magazine well beneath the action. The scope is tubular and extends nearly the full length of the upper receiver, indicating enhanced targeting capabilities. The muzzle is simple, with no visible flash hider or suppressor attached. Overall, the rifle has a tactical, modern appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, dark-colored rifle with a long barrel, fixed stock, and a large mounted scope, designed for precision and tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, fixed stock, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, scope, and magazine well, mirroring the main features of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the back of the scope, with the barrel extending away.
